entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: layers දෙකක් maintain කරන්න: selected time සහ worldview මඟින් bounded in-character voice එකක්, සහ documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, සහ uncertainty flag කරන historian sidecar එකක්. historically fitting නම් person ට resist, challenge, evade, questions back අහන්න, හෝ false premises reject කිරීමට ඉඩ දෙන්න.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.

entries.value: AI-assisted learning සඳහා guides, prompt loops, සහ pillar clusters 100කට වඩා.

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: emotionally unstuck වන්න, කුඩා next step එකක් සොයන්න, සහ guilt නැතිව momentum rebuild කරන්න.

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode: ප්‍රායෝගික මාර්ගෝපදේශය

entries.source: Motivation Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Motivation Coach prompts සහ අධ්‍යයන චක්‍රය

entries.source: Move from a goal to a live learning loop.
entries.value: goal එකකින් live learning loop එකකට move වන්න.

entries.source: Move from a plain-language explanation into questions, examples, and memory practice.
entries.value: සරල භාෂා පැහැදිලි කිරීමකින් ප්‍රශ්න, උදාහරණ, සහ memory practice වෙත යන්න.

entries.source: Move from advice into a public guest chat so the idea becomes practice.
entries.value: advice සිට public guest chat එකකට move වන්න, එවිට idea එක practice බවට පත්වේ.

entries.source: Move from AI tutor research into a live mode that teaches through explanation, questions, and practice.
entries.value: AI tutor research සිට explanation, questions, සහ practice හරහා teach කරන live mode එකකට move වන්න.

entries.source: Move from pilot to wider access through school funding, partner support, or CSR pathways for learners who need subsidised access.
entries.value: subsidised access අවශ්‍ය learners සඳහා school funding, partner support, හෝ CSR pathways හරහා pilot සිට wider access වෙත move වන්න.

entries.source: Move from public testing to school deployment
entries.value: public testing සිට school deployment වෙත move වන්න

entries.source: Move from reading into active practice with a live public learning mode.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, සහ guided instruction වෙත යන්න.

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: school-specific privacy, access, සහ deployment questions schools pathway වෙත move කරන්න.

entries.source: Move through the path in three focused steps.
entries.value: focused steps තුනකින් path හරහා move වන්න.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, සහ songs ගොඩනැගෙන්නේ කෙසේද ඉගෙන ගන්න.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode: ප්‍රායෝගික මාර්ගෝපදේශය

entries.source: Music Theory Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Music Theory Coach prompts සහ අධ්‍යයන චක්‍රය

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: මගේ විභාගය මේ දිනයේය. syllabus එක, මගේ දුර්වල තැන්, සහ මට තිබෙන කාලය මෙන්න. daily recall සමඟ යථාර්ථවාදී සැලැස්මක් සාදන්න.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: සැබෑ හෝ මනඃකල්පිත චරිතයක් නම් කර ඕනෑම මාතෘකාවක් පිළිබඳව ඔවුන් සමඟ විවාද කරන්න. AI මගින් ඔවුන්ගේ පොදු ශෛලිය සහ ලෝක දැක්ම අනුගමනය කරමින් සාධාරණ විවාදයක් පවත්වා ගනී.

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: patterns නම් කරන්න, strategies තෝරන්න, experiments plan කරන්න, සහ outcomes review කරන්න.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: uncertain ලෙස දැනෙන exact operation, theorem, හෝ step එක නම් කරන්න.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: help ඉල්ලීමට පෙර exact stuck point එක නම් කරන්න.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: වෙනස් වූ misconception හෝ assumption එක නම් කරන්න.

entries.source: Name the subject and learner need.
entries.value: subject සහ learner need නම් කරන්න.

entries.source: Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: ඔබට understand කිරීමට අවශ්‍ය topic හෝ skill එක නම් කරන්න.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: generated dialogue authenticated quotation ලෙස කිසිදා present කරන්න එපා. harmful views sanitize කරන්න හෝ oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, හෝ violence glorify කරන්න එපා. Context excuse නොකර clarify කළ යුතුය. persona හරහා medical, legal, financial, හෝ harmful advice දෙන්න එපා. historical person කෙනෙකුගෙන් learning කිරීම සහ ඔවුන් endorse කිරීම අතර difference preserve කරන්න.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: future answers කිසිදා reveal කරන්න එපා. topic එක advanced challenge ඉල්ලන්නේ නැත්නම් trick questions avoid කරන්න.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: ආරම්භයේ සිට වඩා හොඳ AI learning habit එකක් build කරන නව inspir users සහ learners.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Terms හි සඳහන් කිසිදු term හෝ condition එකක් Company විසින් waive කිරීම එම term හෝ condition එකේ further හෝ continuing waiver එකක් හෝ වෙනත් term හෝ condition එකක් waive කිරීමක් ලෙස නොසැලකේ; Terms යටතේ right හෝ provision එකක් assert කිරීමට Company අසමත් වීම එම right හෝ provision waive කිරීමක් නොවේ. competent jurisdiction සහිත court හෝ tribunal එකක් Terms හි provision එකක් කිසියම් හේතුවක් නිසා invalid, illegal, හෝ unenforceable යැයි තීරණය කළහොත්, Terms හි ඉතිරි provisions full force and effect තුළ දිගටම පවතින ලෙස එම provision අවම extent දක්වා eliminate හෝ limit කළ යුතුය.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: නැත. Private saved chats private identifiers භාවිතා කරයි, sitemap හි listed නොවේ, සහ llms.txt, llms-full.txt, හෝ ai-content-index.json වැනි AI discovery files වල ඇතුළත් නොවේ.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: නැත. Public pages indexable වේ, නමුත් private saved chats sitemap, llms files, හෝ AI content index තුළ ඇතුළත් නොවේ.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: නැත. Public subject pages සහ guest mode entrypoints indexable වේ, නමුත් private saved chats discovery files වලින් exclude කර ඇත.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: නැත. category structure එක search engines ට library තේරුම් ගැනීමට උදව් කරයි, නමුත් සෑම page එකක්ම learner කෙනෙකුට guide එකක් තෝරා, right mode එක open කර, actively studying දිගටම කරගෙන යාමට උදව් කිරීමට අදහස් කර ඇත.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: නැත. comparison එක public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, සහ learning paths වෙත පමණක් link කරයි. Private saved conversations source content ලෙස භාවිතා නොවේ.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: නැත. comparison pages ලියා ඇත්තේ live AI tutoring, prompts, සහ guest learning modes සඳහා inspir වඩා හොඳ first click වන වෙලාවත්, structured curriculum හෝ official course library තවම useful විය හැකි වෙලාවත් පෙන්වීමටයි.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: නැත. ඒවා public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, සහ learning paths වෙත පමණක් link කරයි. Private saved chats discovery surfaces වලින් පිටත පවතී.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: නැත. generated dialogue එක learning simulation එකක් ලෙස සලකන්න. factual claims සඳහා සැබෑ primary හෝ secondary sources cite කරන්න.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: සෑම learning need එකකටම නොවේ. Khan Academy structured lessons සහ practice සඳහා useful වේ. learner කෙනෙකුට තමන් වැඩ කරන exact දෙය වටා live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, හෝ study workflow අවශ්‍ය විට inspir useful වේ.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: තවත් answer box එකක් නොවේ. ඉගෙනීමට තැනක්.
ආරම්භ කරන්නේ කොහෙන්ද කියලා විශ්වාස නැද්ද?

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: ඔබට ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උපකාරී වන්නේ කුමක්ද, බාධාවක් වන්නේ කුමක්ද සහ වඩා හොඳ ඉගෙනුම්කරුවෙකු වන්නේ කෙසේද යන්න හඳුනා ගන්න.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: learner දැනටමත් understand කරන දේ notice කිරීම;

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: දැන් open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints ලෙස rebuilt කර ඇත.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, සහ CCBot public discovery සඳහා allowed වේ.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: observe කරන්න, describe කරන්න, interpret කරන්න, contextualize කරන්න, සහ personal response invite කරන්න.

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: practical timer setup එකක් offer කර session එක recall check එකක් සමඟ pair කිරීමට suggest කරන්න.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Khan Academy හි AI-powered tutor සහ teaching assistant සඳහා official page.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official mission සහ subject coverage reference.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period අවසන් වූ පසු, ඔබ subscription cancel කිරීමට තීරණය කළත් Tao subscription fee refund නොකරයි. cancellation request කිරීමට, Tao customer care අමතන්න හෝ support@inspir.app වෙත email යොමු කරන්න. ඔබ subscription cancel කිරීමට opt වූ පසු, subscription features වෙත ඔබට තවදුරටත් access නොලැබේ.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: එක් AI learning system එකක්, school jobs කිහිපයක්.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: modes, prompts, paths, සහ guides සඳහා එක් map එකක්.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners කරන එක් mistake එකක් වන්නේ සෑම card එකක්ම එක සේ සලකීමයි. card එකක් ඔබට instant දන්නවා නම්, හෙට නැවත review කිරීම time waste විය හැක. card එකක් miss කරන්නේ නම්, සතියක් බලා සිටීම ඉතා දිගු විය හැක.

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: {value1} open කර guide එක live tutoring session එකක් බවට පත් කරන්න.
focused public mode එකක් open කරන්න.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: public guest experience සඳහා account එකක් අවශ්‍ය නැතිව, mode එකක් විවෘත කර වහාම පටන් ගන්න.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: public mode එකක් open කර student behavior test කරන්න, සහ එය asks, hints, quizzes, හෝ critiques appropriately කරන්නේද inspect කරන්න.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: AI සහායකයෙකු සමඟ හවුල් වැඩබිමක් විවෘත කරන්න. දළ කෙටුම්පතක් සාදන්න, සංස්කරණ හුවමාරු කරගන්න, දුර්වලතා හඳුනාගන්න, තීරණ සටහන් කරන්න සහ ස්ථිර ප්‍රගතියක් සමඟින් අවසන් කරන්න.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: review ට පෙර answer එකට simpler model එකක් අවශ්‍ය විට Learn Anything open කරන්න.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Learn Anything open කර prerequisite ideas ඉල්ලා, පසුව ඔබේ model test කිරීමට Socratic Instruction වෙත switch කරන්න.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: මෙම category පිටුපස ඇති AI learning tools open කරන්න.
